How do you multiply rational expressions: 您如何乘以理性表达方式 ?
Factor everything, cancel common factors: 乘以所有因素,取消共同因素,乘以剩余数数和分母
How do you divide rational expressions?: 你如何区分理性表达方式?
What should you do first before multiply: 在乘法之前,你应该先做什么?
Factor all numerators and denominators: 乘以所有计数器和分母
State excluded values from:: 国家将下列价值观排除在外:
All original denominators (and the divis: 所有原始分母( 以及除法时的分数点数)
Why can't you cancel terms?: 为什么你不能取消条件?
Only factors (entire multiplied parts) c: 只能取消因数(整乘部分)
After multiplying or dividing, should yo: 乘法或分法后,您应该简化吗?
Yes — always simplify the result by canc: 是——总是通过取消共同因素来简化结果
